title: chloraea biserialis
intro: Chloraea biserialis, also known as the New Zealand orchid, is a species of orchid native to New Zealand. It is a flowering plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations and reducing inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Chloraea biserialis can be prepared into herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
